short_description.value: SatCLIP is a global, general-purpose geographic location encoder trained via contrastive learning to match multispectral Sentinel-2 satellite imagery with their geographic coordinates, producing 256-dimensional location embeddings for downstream geospatial tasks.

backbone.value: Siren (Sinusoidal Representation Network) with Spherical Harmonics positional encoding

pretext_training_type.value: Contrastive learning (CLIP objective) between image and location embeddings

pretraining.value: Contrastive pretraining aligning location encoder outputs (from coordinates) with image encoder outputs (from Sentinel-2 multispectral images) using the CLIP loss. The image encoder is frozen except for the last projection layer.

value.value: Spherical harmonics positional encoding for coordinates
Frozen image encoder except last projection layer

sampling.value: Uniform random sampling over global land mass
